title: Commit-subject pre-flight: Cycles 6-15 (plus 8a) of post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md — 6 over-limit, 1 borderline, alternatives proposed
body:
Pre-flight against commitlint `header-max-length: 100` (config-conventional default; counts UTF-16 code units / characters, not bytes).

**Scope note**: Lunar's brief named "Cycles 6–16". The plan (`post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md`) only enumerates Cycles 6, 7, 8, 8a, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 — there is no Cycle 16. Treating brief as "Cycles 6 through 15 inclusive + 8a" = 11 cycles. Flag to Director if Cycle 16 is expected from a different source.

**Method**: each cycle's intended commit subject inferred from the YAML todos block (lines 21–166) plus the matching cycle section body. Subjects are projections, not authored by Charcoal yet; treat as templates Charcoal can adopt or adjust.

## Summary

- 11 cycles measured
- **6 OVER 100 chars**: Cycles 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 15
- **1 BORDERLINE at exactly 100**: Cycle 14
- **4 OK**: Cycles 6, 7, 8a, 13

## Projected subjects + alternatives

| Cycle | Projected | Chars | Status | Recommended sub-100 alternative |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6  | `feat(pdr): land PDR-078 (liveness-heartbeat-contract, portable) (tidy cycle 6)` | 78 | OK | (no change needed) |
| 7  | `feat(adr): land ADR-186 (comms-event-heartbeat-lifecycle-substrate) (tidy cycle 7)` | 82 | OK | (no change needed) |
| 8  | `feat(skill): thin start-right-team §0.5 to PDR-078 pointer + reciprocal PDR-027/063/064 §Related (tidy cycle 8)` | 111 | **OVER** | **A** (98ch) `feat(skill): thin start-right-team §0.5 to PDR-078 + reciprocal §Related amendments (tidy cycle 8)` ◇ **B** (87ch) `feat(skill): collapse §0.5 to PDR-078 pointer + PDR-027/063/064 §Related (tidy cycle 8)` ◇ **C** (89ch) `feat(skill): start-right-team §0.5 → PDR-078 pointer + reciprocal §Related (tidy cycle 8)` |
| 8a | `feat(adr): land ADR-187 (Claude self-modification authz cure-shape, WS-8) (tidy cycle 8a)` | 89 | OK | (no change needed; ADR number assumed — verify against actual next-available ADR slot at cycle-open) |
| 9  | `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch --seed-from-now flag + auto-seed-on-missing default (WS1, tidy cycle 9)` | 102 | **OVER** | **A** (97ch) `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch --seed-from-now + default auto-seed-on-missing (WS1, tidy cycle 9)` ◇ **B** (83ch) `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch auto-seed + --seed-from-now flag (WS1, tidy cycle 9)` ◇ **C** (89ch) `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch auto-seed-on-missing + --seed-from-now (WS1, tidy cycle 9)` |
| 10 | `feat(agent-tools): redesign comms-watch seen-state to mtime watermark + ephemeral cache + legacy migration (WS2, tidy cycle 10)` | 127 | **OVER** | **A** (91ch) `feat(agent-tools): redesign comms-watch seen-state (WS2: mtime + ephemeral) (tidy cycle 10)` ◇ **B** (89ch) `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch seen-state to mtime + ephemeral cache (WS2, tidy cycle 10)` — push "legacy migration" + "watermark" detail to body |
| 11 | `chore(agent-tools): remove .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/ + drop compat read + SKILL §0 update (WS3, tidy cycle 11)` | 123 | **OVER** | **A** (96ch) `chore(agent-tools): remove comms-seen/ + drop compat read + SKILL §0 update (WS3, tidy cycle 11)` ◇ **B** (92ch) `chore(agent-tools): drop comms-seen/ directory + compat read + SKILL §0 (WS3, tidy cycle 11)` ◇ **C** (93ch) `chore(agent-tools): retire comms-seen/ (WS3: remove + compat-drop + SKILL §0) (tidy cycle 11)` — push full path to body |
| 12 | `test(agent-tools): replace S5443 14× fixture sites in watcher-staleness + watcher-heartbeat + adjacent (tidy cycle 12)` | 118 | **OVER** | **A** (94ch) `test(agent-tools): replace S5443 14× fixture sites in watcher tests + adjacent (tidy cycle 12)` — name the two test files in body ◇ **B-rejected** S5443×14 with multiplication-sign is 104ch; the multiplication sign char saves nothing |
| 13 | `chore(eslint): add cpd-exclusion for CLI bin resolveSelfIdentity duplication (tidy cycle 13)` | 92 | OK | (no change needed; reflects R1#3 narrowed scope — extraction already landed in `340752bb`) |
| 14 | `test(agent-tools): delete audit-shaped tests in commit-workflow.unit.test.ts:221-247 (tidy cycle 14)` | 100 | **BORDERLINE** | At exactly the limit; `<=` passes per config-conventional but no headroom. **Trim** (94ch) `test(agent-tools): delete audit-shaped tests in commit-workflow:221-247 (tidy cycle 14)` |
| 15 | `chore(fitness): branch fitness drain — soft markdownlint sweep + napkin rotation + pending-graduations drain (tidy cycle 15)` | 124 | **OVER** | **A** (96ch) `chore(fitness): markdownlint sweep + napkin rotation + pending-graduations drain (tidy cycle 15)` ◇ **B** (96ch) `chore(fitness): branch fitness drain composite (markdownlint + napkin + buffers) (tidy cycle 15)` |

## Convention pattern observed

For new authoring (Cycles 6, 7, 8a) the natural template is `feat(<scope>): land <ARTEFACT> (<short-descriptor>) (tidy cycle N)`. For ratifying existing drafts (already landed, Cycles 3 + 4) the precedent is `chore(pdr): ratify PDR-XXX (<descriptor>) as Accepted (tidy cycle N)`. Cycle 5a's recent failure used `feat(pdr): land PDR-XXX (<long descriptor>) + <secondary> + <tertiary>` — that "(long descriptor) + secondary + tertiary" composite is the structural over-runner; push at most one parenthetical descriptor into the subject and push the rest to the commit body.

## Caveats

- All projections are templates. Charcoal authors the actual subject at cycle-open and may legitimately revise.
- Cycle 6 / 7 / 8a's "PDR-078 / ADR-186 / ADR-187" numbers are assumed against current next-available slots; verify against the live `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/` and `docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/` directories at cycle-open.
- Em-dash and § characters count as 1 UTF-16 unit each (commitlint string length); safe to use but bytes ≠ chars by 1 each.

## Boundary disposition

Read-only against the plan file; no edits made. No source claim opened. Standing by for follow-on routing per Lunar's fan-out broadcast (`22:12:23Z`).
